docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT THU, LE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF PHAN SUI HO APPEARED. DEFENDANT LE THU APPEARED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, PHAN SUI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THU, LE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-30-25 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 502
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, PHAN SUI
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT THU, LE MAILED TO RESPONDENT HO, PHAN SUI
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # H5725B10D002, TAG # 038197 BY APPELLANT THU, LE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED MAY-30-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THU, LE
ORDER ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONETRIAL APPROVED BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY APPELLANT THU, LE
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, PHAN SUI AS TO DEFENDANT THU, LE
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (D206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2025 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON OCT-30-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 502, JUDGE VICTOR HWANG. (D206)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,200.00 FILED BY HO, PHAN SUI AS TO DEFENDANT THU, LE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-05-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2025 HELD AND JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE RESPONDENT PHAN SUI HO. SEE JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HONORABLE VICTOR M. HWANG; CLERK: C. CHENG; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; BAILIFF: NOT ASSIGNED. (502)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HO, PHAN SUI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT THU, LE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVE NEGLIGENCE ON PART OF LANDLORD. COURT IS AWARDING $500 FOR ELECTRICITY BILL AND CLEANING COSTS AFTER FLOODING. THIS DOES NOT BAN A LAWSUIT AGAINST FORMER UPSTAIRS TENANT WHO WERE RESPONSIBLE. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THU, LE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
